title: libssh security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[0.11.1-4]
- Rebuild due to broken build auto-tagging

[0.11.1-3]
- Fix CVE-2025-5318
  Resolves: RHEL-111720

[0.11.1-2]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018
